name: My Name is legnE and I am Evil(also Claire is here, and Engel!)
description:
"My name is legnE and I am evil... as well."
You and Claire, after encountering erialC meet up with Engel and tell him about that strange enounter.
And just when you think that one evil doppelganger was enough...
And none of you were ready for his arrival.
(unfortunately, Conquest Invincible isn't here)

(All Characters 18+)
